name: repeated_instructions
text:

name: long_context
text:
Task: compress this prompt while preserving requirements.
Context: A customer reports intermittent failures after deployment. The service retries requests, records structured logs, emits metrics, and writes idempotency keys. The deployment changed cache TTLs, request batching, and timeout behavior. Context: A customer reports intermittent failures after deployment. The service retries requests, records structured logs, emits metrics, and writes idempotency keys. The deployment changed cache TTLs, request batching, and timeout behavior.
Output format: bullet points.

name: constraint_heavy
text: Write a recruiter update. Keep it under 70 words. Include Cloudflare Workers and Durable Objects. Exclude hype. Tone: direct. Return JSON.

name: cache_repeat
text:
Please compile this for reuse. Please compile this for reuse.
Use bullet points. Use bullet points.
Never expose credentials. password=SuperSecretPass123!
